characters.name: "The Driver"
characters.description:
"The Driver"is a minor character who appears in theSeason Fiveepisode ofGeorge Lopeztitled"George Drives the Batmobile"episode #4). The part of the driver is played in the episode byRen Casey. When George has to escortBenny,Ginaand their girlfriends around after George, in refusing to help Benny buy another car when her breaks down, he gets duped by the girls into taking up the driver's challange to race him while waiting at the traffic light at a busy intersection.
When he pulls up in the lane next George the young driver puts up his hand, letting George know that he wants to race him, George tries at first to ignore him, but when Benny cajoles him, calling him a"wuss"for not wanting to race the guy, he changes his mind, calling the guy out"You want some of this, punk!??"as the guy replies,"Cool...but the loser's takin' your women home!" Just as the traffic light changes and the race begins and ends, George, who began taunting his race challanger when he won the race, gets stopped by a nearby police officer (Ron Pearson). who gets George's license suspended for 30 days.

characters.name: Adam Connors
characters.description: Adam Connors, a former boyfriend of Carmen's, was a recurring character who appeared in two episodes ofGeorge Lopez. Adam is a boy who dated Carmen inSeason 2and gave her a hickey in the episode"Love Bites".Piper Moreystarted a rumor that Adam and Carmen had sex to the entire school and instigate a fight with Carmen. The schools conflict resolution counselor suspended Carmen for it. Adam later lied saying that they did have sex to try and get back together with Carmen when George and Angie wouldn't let them date when they both got hickeys. With George and Angie's insistence, Adam is brought into the office of Mr. Tommy Durango, the school conflict resolution counselor, to admit that Piper started the fight on the school grounds with Carmen which got her suspension from school rescinded.

characters.name: Ben Adams
characters.description: Ben Adamsis a character who appears in theSeason Twoepisode ofGeorge Lopeztitled"Token of Unappreciation"(episode #2). The part of Ben is played in the episode byJames Lesure. When George feels unappreciated byJackandMel, when he's not allowed to present the company's lastet figures in their company conference when they say that the conference "is only for the big boys", and when he's later asked by the brothers to work at his old plant line machine position due to a lull in production for just a few days, it influences him to reach out Ben, who's the president of AiroCorp, Powers Aviation's biggest competitor when it comes to landing goverment contracts. When George makes up his mind to visit AeroCorp to talk to Ben, he expresses his eagerness to hire George for an immediate position as Vice President, without him having to go through an interview; when George asks if they wanted to see if he could do the job, Ben tells him that he's sure that he can do the job, but expresses the need for the company to hire him to fill an ethnic quota, because he's a Mexican-American, (Ben cites that George is a "dark-skinned" hermano, as the last guy named Lopez could pass for Italian!)

characters.name: Allison
characters.description: Allison, (played byDemetra Raven), was a minor character who appeared in theSeason TwoGeorge Lopeztitled"Profiles in Courage"(episode #18). Allison, a grade school classmate and friend ofMax, was Max's pretend wife. She is very peppy and protective of Max. It is also implied that she "drinks a lot ofJuicy Juiceboxes". She also goes overboard in treating Max as if he's a real husband, and annoys him when she calls him "pumpkin". It also seems like she's the one runs the whole marriage. On their one week anniversary, she gave Max a super ball. Max forgot to give her a gift and gave her gum for her present and she said that Max didn't care about their marriage.

characters.name: Amy Kirkland
characters.description: Amy Kirklandwas a recurring character who was nicknamed"Accident Amy"due to always getting into accidents. The part of Amy is played by series co-executive producerSandra Bullock. Amy is kinda loopy and accident prone. She can also be quite competitive. She left Powers Aviation for a while because her arm got crushed by a machine. When she returns to the plant after recuperating and collecting Workers' Compensation rehabing, it was found out that she andRandy,Benny'snew beau, and their co-worker, were dating before he started dating Benny. But, before Randy and Benny, who, by this time are engaged, and were about to get married, Amy showed up at the bachelor party and made Randy leave Benny jilted at the altar. This was the last appearance of Amy. Amy is kinda loopy and accident prone. She can also be quite competitive.
characters.personality_section: Amy is kinda loopy and accident prone. She can also be quite competitive.

characters.name: Angie Lopez
characters.description: Angela "Angie" Lopez (née Palmero)is a main character and deuteragonist on the sitcomGeorge Lopez. Her current age would be 60 years. On the ABC-TV seriesGeorge Lopez, Angie is played byConstance Marie. Angie is a loving wife, mother and a general selfless and friendly person. She is always willing to help any person in need out of wanting to be a good person. She is very sensitive about many things and while she is smart and more level-headed than George, could occasionally be naively idealistic. While her belief in the best in people turns out to be correct, other times she proves be harshly wrong. The times she's wrong is mainly when it comes to Benny. Angie Lopez(née Palmero) was born in Miami, Florida on May 11, 1965 to Cuban immigrant parentsVictor PalmeroandEmilina Palmero, but raised in Los Angeles, California. She is married to her high school sweetheartGeorge Lopezand together, they have two childrenCarmen LopezandMax Lopez. Angie is a loving wife, mother and a general selfless and friendly person. She is always willing to help any person in need out of wanting to be a good person. She is very sensitive about many things and while she is smart and more level-headed than George, could occasionally be naively idealistic. While her belief in the best in people turns out to be correct, other times she proves be harshly wrong. The times she's wrong is mainly when it comes to Benny.

characters.name: Mary Bass
characters.description: Mary Bass, a mortuary sales rep, appears in theSeason Sixepisode"George's Grave Mistake Sends Him to a Funeral, Holmes"(episode #8). The part of Mary is played in the episode byElena Lyons. When he and Ernie stop by the mortuary, George tries to pose as a coroner in trying to get the lot next to he and Angie's, in which a deceased couple was already buried; when he offers to even dig up the remains of the couple, the mortuary salesperson, Mary, explains to him that it's illegal, as he finally comes clean and tells her his name, and reveals that he bought two burial lots for he and Angie two years earlier, but forgot to buy a third lot, which was intended for Benny, as he asks if he could reserve another next to theirs. When Mary, the salesperson, tells her and Ernie that there were three lots together, but two plots away from the ones that they already had reserved, he seemed satisfied and ready to exchange the ones he had in the purchase of the three, until Mary tells him it would cost $15,000 for the additional plot.

characters.name: Lawrence Baxter
characters.description: Lawrence Baxterwas a character who appeared in theSeason 3episode ofGeorge Lopeztitled"Angie Gets Tanked"(episode #19). The part of Lawrence was played byJamal Mixon. At Carmen's high school's carnival fundraiser, George and Angie manage the dunk tank. George insults an overweight kid named Lawrence (Jamal Mixon), calling him "the hardest working colon in high school"; when he complains to which prompts Principal Stoller (Almy Brooks) to telling George and Angie that the school has a "zero tolerance policy" concering verbal abuse, which includes faculty and parents, as she makes George leave the school grounds and write an apology letter to the kid. Then, the next day, when a picture of Angie, in her wet T-shirt from being dunked in the dunk tank, is posted by someone on the school website and everyone begins to make fun of Carmen, which makes George believe that it was possibly Lawrence who was the picture taker, asEric McNamara,Jason's, wheelchair bound kid brother, who went with the Lopezes to the carival with his big brother told he and Angie, to cover up the fact that he took the picure as a joke.

characters.name: Benny Lopez
characters.description: Benita "Benny" Lopez ( née Diaz)is one of the main characters. She is the bitter, emotionally abusive mother of George Lopez. She is played onGeorge LopezbyBelita Moreno. She's also played in a "flashback memory" sequence in one episode byMaria Beck. Benita "Benny" Lopez ( née Diaz) was born to Louisa Diaz and an unnamed father on May 21, 1948 in Los, Angeles, California. She is of Mexican decent. She metManuel "Manny" Lopezwhen she was 16 years old and got pregnant for her first childGeorge Lopez. When George was two, she got pregnant with her second childLinda Lorenzowhen Manny walked out. She tried to give away George, but regretted it and begged the Delgado family for George back in exchange for a dog. She ultimately gave up her daughter Linda instead to the Lorenzo's. When George was older, she convinced him his father died rather than tell him his father actually left and abandoned them. Benny isn't the best of mothers, exposing George to an abusive, dysfunctional home life and childhood and guarding secrets from her son that were unveiled during his adulthood. Despite that, she tried to be a good mother while raising him, and she really does love him. When George was in his mid 30s, George found out his father was actually still alive and living as a wealthy contractor in Phoenix, Arizona. He remarried to Lydia Lopez and had their first child togetherGeorge Lopez II. When they went to Arizona to meet his father, George and his father got into a fight and George was arrested for assaulting his dad and sent to jail. Benny can seem bitter or cold sometimes, showing little care for her own son while he was growing up. Secretly, she does love George and deprived him of many privileges during his childhood not because she did not care about him, but because she worried about his safety. Despite not being the best role model for George when he was growing up, Benny did try, even when she thought she couldn't handle a kid. In the episode where her mother was revealed, it was stated that Benny had given George away, but only to give him a better family. After George was given back to her, he discovers that she did try and actually did do better than his grandma did. Benny does seem to love her grandchildren, though, as she has given them some advice, none of it has helped. She seems to have a closer relationship with Max, possibly due to seeing parallels with his father and wanting to be a better (Grand)parent to him (albeit not that successfully). Benny often chastises her granddaughter Carmen for her flirty and rebellious nature, possibly due to how Benny's similiar behavior in her teens led to many problems in her life. Benny is quite cynical and stubborn and hates to admit to making mistakes. She is an alcoholic and has a strong cigarette addiction. Her relationship with her son revolves around the two insulting each other with the occasional compliment thrown in before the insulting continues. She frequently calls George's wife, Angie "Princes

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: This page is a candidate for deletion. If you disagree with its deletion, please explain why atCategory talk:Candidates for deletionor improve the page and remove the {{delete}} tag. Remember to checkwhat links hereand thethe page historybefore deleting.

characters.name: Blaine McNamara
characters.description: Stacy Keach as Blaine McNamara Blaine McNamara, played by Stacy Keach, is Jason McNamara's father. He is incredibly wealthy and lives in Switzerland during the events in which he is mentioned in the show. He returns to the USA to visit Jason while he is living with the Lopez's following Jason's arrest. He offers them thousands of dollars in restitution in addition to thousands more, if the Lopez family can continue to house Jason, but conflict arises when Blaine reveals that he's knowingly utilizing a trainer for Jason that pushes a steroid regimen. Although Jason predicts that if he agrees to take George's advice and refuses the steroid regimen his father would not pay George any money for housing Jason, the outcome of this dispute is never definitively stated. However, Blaine does willingly sign over custody of Jason to the Lopez's in the next episode, indicating some level of cooperation.

characters.name: Campbell Powers
characters.description: Campbell Powers, was George's assistant manager, and appeared in two episodes in season 2. She was hired by her uncle,Jack Powers, the owner of Power Bros. Most of the men at the factory were in love with her. Even Ernie dubbed her the future "Mrs. Cardenas". She has a bachelor's degree from UCLA and a master's degree from Pepperdine. She is very respectful to George, and is shown to take much responsibility in her work, even taking George's work to his house, and working on Saturdays. But in actuality, she does this because she wants his job. She also hated that the chairs from the factory cafeteria were atFrank'swedding. Campbell dresses very formal for work. She wears a lot of skirts and high heels and wears her hair down.

characters.name: Carla
characters.description: Carlawas a character who appeared in theSeason Twoepisode titled"The Valentine's Day Massacre"(episode #14). The part of Carla is played in the episode byElena St. John. Carla was a fellow cheerleader with Angie Lopez while they were in high school. She was with Angie when they had to decide what loser they were going to go to the Sadie Hawkins Dance with. Angie chose George and Carla got Ernie. Carla seemed to be a sterotypical cheerleader; close with her cheer team mates and thinks very lowly of George and Ernie, as she decided that they are the biggest losers to go to the dance with. According to Ernie, in Season Two; Episode 14, she said "you're probably a human being and deserves to be treated as one." Carla seemed to be a sterotypical cheerleader; close with her cheer team mates and thinks very lowly of George and Ernie, as she decided that they are the biggest losers to go to the dance with. According to Ernie, in Season Two; Episode 14, she said "you're probably a human being and deserves to be treated as one."

characters.name: Carmen Lopez
characters.description: Carmen Lopez  Carmen Consuelo Lopezis the first child and only daughter ofGeorgeandAngie Lopez. She's the secondary deuteragonist. Carmen is passionate, emotional, lacks self-esteem, selfish, sassy, rebellious, reckless, smart mouthed, argumentative, dim-witted, and at times dishonest, ungrateful, careless, somewhat disrespectful, but ultimately kind at heart. She feels like she is held in a prison by her family and that they are controlling her, especially by her father, George, whereas Angie believes that Carmen has not yet reached her full potential and lets her do most of the stuff she wants to do. Carmen talks like a valley girl. Carmen and her brother, Max are always at each others throats since Max seems to interfere with almost everything she does in her life. Although they have the occasional rift, Carmen seems to love Max a lot and Max seems to love his sister the same. Even though Carmen is a kind teenager, she always knows how to scare her parents into letting her do what she wants. She once told her parents she was pregnant so that she could get married to Jason. Although this was originally planned as a trick, she is shown completely unhesitant (even excited) to actually get pregnant for real; this scared Jason off.

characters.name: Cecelia Lopez
characters.description: Cecelia Lopez, (portrayed by Olga Merediz), is a minor character inGeorge Lopez. Cecilia Lopez is Manny Lopez's sister. Cecilia sent gifts to George when he was little, but Benny lied and said they were poisonous. Cecilia and George reunited at a warehouse and revealed to George that Manny wasn't dead after all. Cecilia and Benny don't have a close relationship because she has lied many times in her life. Cecilia has dark hair and fair skin. Cecilia seems to be a believable realistic woman. She is usually quite friendly and kind, super joyed to see his nephew George who she hasn't seen in decades. Cecilia has dark hair and fair skin. Cecilia seems to be a believable realistic woman. She is usually quite friendly and kind, super joyed to see his nephew George who she hasn't seen in decades.

characters.name: Kristy Chapman
characters.description: Kristy ChapmanwasMax Lopez'sgirlfriend, who appeared in theSeason Fiveepisode ofGeorge Lopeztitled"The Kidney Stays in the Picture"(episode #14). The part of Kristy is played in the episode byAshly Holloway. When Kristy and new boyfriendMaxbegin kissing out in the hammock in the backyard,Angie, who begins to become concerned that her son and his girlfriend are moving too fast, imploresGeorgeto do something about it. As George says to her that it's nothing to be concerned about, the two young lovebirds had been saying "I love you" to each other, George then agrees. He tells Max that "you don't say I love you to a girl" until "you find the right shark you want to spend the rest of your life with!"

characters.name: Duane "Dog" Chapman
characters.description: Duane Lee "Dog" Chapman(born February 2, 1953) made a guest appearance as himself, wherein George goes to his motherBenny'sneighborhood to pick up her pet dog and meets him instead in theSeason Fiveepisode ofGeorge Lopeztitled"George's Dog Days of Bummer"(episode #3). A bounty hunter by trade and a former bail bondsman, Duane starred in the A&E Network programDog the Bounty Hunter, a weekly reality television program which ran for eight seasons. from 2004-12. He also starred on the CMT Network reality television programDog and Beth: On the Huntwhich aired from April 21, 2013 to August 22, 2015.

characters.name: Chris
characters.description: Chrisis a character who appears in the episode ofGeorge Lopeztitled"George Gets Cross Over Freddie"inSeason 5(episode #19). The role of Chris is played in the episode byBrian Austin Green, who also played the role in the ABC-TV sitcomFreddie, which was the spinoff/crossover series forGLwhich also starredFreddie Prinze Jr., who plays the role of Chris's friendFreddie Moreno. Chris is the sidekick, buddy and busines partner of Freddie, who accompanies him to L.A. from Chicago to meet with whom they beleive is an internet child predator who's been corresponding with Freddie's nieceZoey(played byChloe Bridges), which happens to beGeorge, whom in thinking likewise, has teamed withErnieto meet with whom turns out to be Freddie and Chris, as they suspect the same of the one who's been chatting online with Max; when the four meet at the hotel room and almost come to blows, as Chris threatens to douse Ernie with a bottle of hot sauce on the hotel room kitchen table, as they realize, through George and Freddie exchanging family snapshots of they and Max and Chloe, that Max and Zoey were really chat partners, as the four men "bury the hatchet" and decide to go out to a nearby bar to get some beers.

characters.name: Claudia
characters.description: Claudia, (played byDagney Kerr), was a minor recurring character onGeorge Lopez. Claudia wasGeorge'sabsent-minded secretary in Season 1. She laughs at all of George jokes and is not used to having him as her boss and doesn't really respect him yet, but supports him in some situations. She sometimes calls George "boss man". She starting dating when she was 14 with a boy named Tommy Jenkins. She says that "he was a sweetie" and they would hold hands for hours until her parents went to bed, and then they "went at it like a couple of baby monkeys". Claudia was shocked when she learned that George was 17 when he started dating and she said laughing"Shut up!", thinking he was only kidding. Claudia and the rest of the factory chipped in 25 dollars to get"Accident Prone" Amy(played bySandra Bullock) flowers for her to feel better but accidentally included Amy. In"Max's Big Adventure", a detective was waiting in George's office because one of the employees had a warrant for beating someone up in a bar, and Claudia said she would shred files, lie, or do anything to help George, who was falsely accused by Claudia. That shows that she is now very respectful and would do anything for George.

characters.name: Cynthia
characters.description: Cynthiais a minor character who appears in theSeason Twoepisode ofGeorge Lopeztitled"Profiles in Courage"(episode #18). The part of Cynthia is played in the episode byDierdre M. Smith. When George informs the Powers Bros. line workers that background checks were needed for those being considered to work on an upcoming U.S. Government defense project, Cynthia, in echoing the sentiments of others on the line, could understan  whyHosni, a fellow line worker also applying for a position working on the project, has to do it, because of his Middle Eastern background, as she cited that he "doesn't smoke or drink" or, asBennysaid "doesn't swear" either.

characters.name: Dr. Holland
characters.description:
Dr. Hollandis a character onGeorge Lopezin the episode"George to the Third Power"in Season Four]] (episode #13).  The part of Dr. Holland is played in the episode byMichael Clarke Duncan. When George and Angie take Max, who's been complaining about his new braces, to see Dr. Holland, whom they settled on seeing again, although George and Angie both dislike him, they settled on him because he's the only orthodontist they can afford.
Dr. Holland, who's the Powers Bros. Aviation company dentist who placed braces onMaxbecause Max claimed that they were too tight, he tells George that if he loosened the braces, when he tried to swallow, they'd "pass right through him, and he wouldn't be fakin' that pain!" When makes a comment about Max being "a wuss" while he has him put on some headphones and listen to music in his office, he also says he couldn't find anything wrong with the braces, as he then says to George and Angie that "kids pick up on the behavior of the parents", "if one of the parents overeacts to the slightest discomfort", concerning Max's claim that his braces hurt.

characters.name: Dr. Lisby
characters.description: Dr. Lisby, the veternarian who performs an X-ray exam onMr. Needles, the Lopez family dog, appears in theSeason Threeepisode ofGeorge Lopeztitled"God Needles George"(episode #15). The part of Dr. Lisby is played in the episode bySteve Hytner. When Mr. Needles gets sick, the family takes him to the pet clinic, as Dr. Lisby examines him and runs an X-ray on him to find that he has a tumor; among the choices he offers to George and Angie are to either 1) have him perform surgery on the dog to remove the tumor, which would cost about $3,000, which George balks at, or 2) Have Mr. Needles put to sleep, which would still cost $150, which George also balks at, after which George and Angie take Mr. Needles back home with them. When they take the dog back to Dr. Lisby for a follow-up, he, after he runs another X-ray on Mr. Needles, can't find the tumor which he first found, as he explains it must be miraculous, which Max, who prayed for Mr. Needles to get well, attributes the healing to. What Dr. Lisby is able to find is a heart-shaped earring that belonged to Angie, who said"I've been looking for that!", that had disappeared; it turns out that the dog swallowed it, as Dr. Lisby says to Angie "And you'll be finding it soon!"

characters.name: Dr. Woodson
characters.description: Dr. Woodsonis a character who appears in theSeason Fiveepisode ofGeorge Lopez (TV series)titled"The Kidney Stays in the Picture"(episode #14). The part of Dr. Woodson is played in the episode byKen Howard. When Max begins having trouble drinking down fluids and wetting the bed,GeorgeandAngieagree to take Max to see Dr.Woodson, his childhood doctor. Upon his examination of Max, he informs George and Angie that , because of the tubes leading to Max's kidneys are in an abnormally top narrow position, causing his urine to be backed up, that he has a kidney infection, and because of the resulting kidney infection, he needed surgery, as he also told them that they were lucky that the infection was caught in time, because if it hadn't been, Max could have contracted kidney disease, and would have needed a kidney specialist. Anyhow, Dr. Woodson referred the Lopezes to such a specialist, who Dr. Woodson enviously describes as:"Great guy, big house, trophy wife, works half my hours.... People told me to specialize...but what's more special than kids??"''Now, if you'll excuse me, I have to look into the waxing ears of a screaming 4-year-old!"

characters.name: Earl
characters.description: Earlis a minor character who appears in theSeason Twoepisode ofGeorge Lopeztitled"Profiles in Courage"(episode #18). The part of Earl is played in the episode bySteven Montfort, who also makes two appearances as an L.A. police officer in theSeason Threeepisodes"What George Doesn't Noah..."(episode #27) and"Now George Noah Ex-Zack-Ly What Happened"(episode #28). When George informs the Powers Bros. line workers that background checks were needed for those being considered to work on an upcoming U.S. Government defense project, Earl, who echoes the sentiments of others, wonders why all of the workers have to have a background check, but, with an unknowing hint of ethnic intolerance, says he could understand whyHosni, a fellow line worker also applying for a position working on the project, has to do it, because of his Middle Eastern background.

characters.name: Emelina Palmero
characters.description: Emelina Palmerois a character who appears in theSeason TwoGeorge Lopeztitled"Meet the Cuban Parents"(episode #11). The part of Emilina is played in the episode bySonia Braga. Emelina is Angie, Gloria and Ray's deceased mother. She married Victor "Vic" Palmero, but divorced him after she had an affair with an apposing man. In her only appearance in the episode"Meet the Cuban Parents"in Season 2, she and Vic flew out from Miami to visit the George and Angie and the family. Emelina seemed to enjoy the time spent with the family in L.A, except that, she makes a few remarks about George, while she still respects him. George stated that She hit George with a wine bottle when Angie and him got married, and still disagrees with it, as well as Vic. She is mentioned from time to time, but after her affair with another man later in the series, she files for a divorce from Vic, which he readily grants. On the phone with her, Vic tells Emelina to "apologize to god for ruining 40 years of marriage" before he hurtles the phone into the bushes and storms away. George pretends not to see this but cannot hide the fact. Vic breaks the news to Angie sending her into a mood swing, which slowly comes to a stop as she accepts the facts and moves on. after Vic discovers that his fiance, Lindsey, was cheating on him with a man half his age, he almost gets back together with Emelina, and forgives her for her previous affair.

characters.name: Ernie Cardenas
characters.description: Sylvie Cardenas (mother) Ernesto "Ernie" Cardenas, age 49, has been George's best friend since the second grade and is his current co-worker. He's a bit childish and insecure, but grows as the series goes on. While he is silly, he is also nice, friendly and lovable. He works on the assembly line at Power Bros. Aviation, He appears as the Tritagonist of the sitcom. Ernie has not always had a good amount of luck with being treated as an adult, but he is a big-hearted and lovable sweetheart and a very loyal friend. Ernie has not always had a good amount of luck with being treated as an adult, but he is a big-hearted and lovable sweetheart and a very loyal friend. While money has been an issue for him, like everyone in the series, he was more than happy to give George's family $3000 to help them pay off the damages to the garage. He is also good with kids, he was more than happy to adopt Ricky to give him a home. He also dated a mother who only was with him because he took care of her kids while she went drinking and went out with other guys.
